/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-lorawan-test-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-lorawan-test-default.so "CMakeFiles/lorawan-test.dir/test/utilities.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/lorawan-test.dir/test/lorawan-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/lorawan-test.dir/test/network-status-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/lorawan-test.dir/test/network-scheduler-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/lorawan-test.dir/test/network-server-test-suite.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-lorawan-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-energy-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-point-to-point-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-buildings-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-propagation-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-mobility-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-antenna-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
